flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY Oneonta rose 14% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.4k → $6.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY Oneonta fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4k → 4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Oneonta fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at SUNY Oneonta rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (54.5% → 64.4%).
